recommendation.summary: Pride weekend in SF is stacked with free culture: Japanese Breakfast at Stern Grove Sunday and the SF Pride Festival at Civic Center Saturday–Sunday. Professionally, the AI Engineer World's Fair runs Jun 29–Jul 2 at Moscone West — worth the $395 for the networking density. Best outdoor window for cycling or running is Sunday (69°F, 14mph wind, 0% rain).

suggested.title: Japanese Breakfast at Stern Grove — free, Sunday Jun 28, 2 PM (standby line if no lottery ticket)
AI Engineer World's Fair 2026 — Jun 29–Jul 2, Moscone West, $395
Cycling or running Sunday Jun 28 — best outdoor day of the week (69°F, calm winds, sunny)
